content.text:
<user_query>
Build a strict zero-regression test matrix for sprint A only. Use current routes and gates. Return compact table: persona, route, expected outcome, state captures required, blocker if fail yes/no. Include only launch-critical rows needed for no-go/go decision.
</user_query>
Exploring the codebase for Sprint A scope, routes, and launch gates to build the test matrix.

Here is a **Sprint A–only** zero-regression matrix aligned with `memory/SPRINT_A_STATUS_REPORT_2026.md` (regression baseline, no-drop integrity, no entitlement/commercial drift) and **current** routing in `frontend/src/App.js`, `LaunchRoute`, `ProtectedRoute`, and `frontend/src/config/routeAccessConfig.js`.

### Sprint A launch-critical matrix (go / no-go)

| Persona | Route | Expected outcome | State captures required | Blocker if fail |
|--------|--------|------------------|-------------------------|-----------------|
| Anonymous | `/` | Marketing home renders; no app shell errors | Screenshot + console (no unhandled errors) | Yes (Product / Commercial surface) |
| Anonymous | `/pricing` | Pricing page renders; copy matches tier reality you ship | Screenshot + pricing DOM / notes vs `pricingTiers` / commercial gate | Yes (Commercial gate) |
| Unauthenticated | `/soundboard` | Redirect to `/login-supabase` (after grace if any) | URL after navigation; optional HAR | Yes (Security / activation) |
| Unauthenticated | `/auth/callback` | OAuth/session handoff completes without error boundary | Network for callback; session presence in storage after | Yes (auth regression) |
| Free (starter tier = unpaid) | `/soundboard` | My Sound Board loads inside `ProtectedRoute` | Session; screenshot; optional `data-testid` where present | Yes (core activation / UX) |
| Free | `/advisor` | Advisor watchtower renders | Session; screenshot | Yes (core loop / Product gate) |
| Free | `/market` | Market page renders | Session; screenshot | Yes (free capability lock) |
| Free | `/market/calibration` | Forensic calibration renders (inherits `/market` access via prefix) | Session; screenshot | Yes (Sprint A route parity / no-drop) |
| Free | `/calibration` | Calibration advisor reachable; `NEEDS_CALIBRATION` non-blocking per guard | `onboardingStatus` + auth state from context; screenshot | Yes (UX / onboarding contract) |
| Free | `/revenue` | **Redirect** to `/biqc-foundation?feature=revenue` (LaunchRoute `paid`) | Initial + final URL; tier snapshot | Yes (Architecture / Commercial — entitlement drift) |
| Free | `/risk` | **Redirect** to `/more-features?feature=risk-workforce` (LaunchRoute `waitlist`) | Initial + final URL; tier snapshot | Yes (same) |
| Free | `/biqc-foundation` | Foundation upsell page loads when entitled path sends user here | URL query `feature`; screenshot | Yes (conversion / messaging parity) |
| Free | `/more-features` | Waitlist / feature request path loads | URL query `feature`; screenshot | Yes (Commercial gate) |
| Free, onboarding incomplete | `/advisor` (non-exempt path) | Redirect to `/onboarding` unless exempt list applies | `onboardingStatus.completed === false`; final URL | Yes (UX gate — activation) |
| Starter (paid) | `/revenue` | `RevenuePage` renders **without** wrongful redirect to foundation | Tier snapshot (`resolveTier`); screenshot | Yes (FE/BE entitlement parity) |
| Starter (paid) | `/board-room` | Board room renders (`LaunchRoute access="paid"`) | Tier snapshot; screenshot | Yes (paid surface sample) |
| Privileged (allow-listed / role) | `/risk` | Renders **or** correct privileged bypass vs free redirect (per `isPrivilegedUser` + LaunchRoute) | User role/email flags; final URL | Yes (Security / Architecture) |
| Non-admin | `/admin` | `AccessDenied` after `/auth/me` admin check | Screenshot `access-denied-screen`; network `/auth/me` | Yes (Security gate) |
| Admin | `/admin` | `AdminDashboard` after successful admin check | Screenshot; `/auth/me` role evidence | Yes (Security gate) |

### Notes (scope discipline)

- **Sprint A “gates”**: rows above are the minimum **route-level** evidence that supports **Product**, **UX**, **Architecture**, **Security**, and **Commercial** must-pass themes from `memory/FUNCTIONAL_SIGNOFF_GATES_2026.md` without re-testing the whole product.
- **Explicitly out of this table** (still in Sprint A checklist but not per-route smoke): edge deploy parity inventory, CI summary, rollback drill — those are **DevOps/Ops** artifacts, not rows in this matrix.
- **Source paths**: routes and wrappers are defined in `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\App.js` (`LaunchRoute`, `ProtectedRoute`); access metadata in `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\config\routeAccessConfig.js`; tier logic in `C:\Users\andre\.cursor\worktrees\tpn\fbn\frontend\src\lib\tierResolver.js`.

If you want this split by **gate owner** (CPO vs Security vs CMO) as an extra column, say so and we can map each row 1:1 to sections 1–10 of `FUNCTIONAL_SIGNOFF_GATES_2026.md`.
